title: Knee pain
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.rationale: Exact phrase located in inspected full source.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for osteoarthritis-compatible knee and hip documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for undifferentiated joint pain, acute injury, and settings outside Dubai.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports usage-related joint pain, stiffness, motion restriction, tenderness, swelling, instability, functional limitation, night pain, fever, redness or heat, weight loss, and systemic concern features.

assessment.text: Describes knee pain location, stairs-related pain, giving way, instability, and hip groin or thigh pain, stiffness, walking pain, restricted movement, and early loss of internal rotation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Osteoarthritis – 28
source.population: Adults with osteoarthritis symptoms, particularly middle-aged and older adults.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.

assessment.text: Defines clinical diagnosis in typical adults, cautions that radiographic findings may not match symptoms, and limits MRI or other imaging to selected uncertainty or alternative-diagnosis contexts.
assessment.rationale: Supports OA terminology and selected X-ray or MRI review without inferring diagnosis from imaging.
